Title: 03 - Endpoint & XDR Investigation
WhyItMatters: Phase 3: Endpoint & XDR Investigation. Use this in order to guide the analyst through a consistent investigation workflow.
ReviewSteps: Open this playbook card in the existing pop-out blade.
Run the related KQL in the order shown.
Validate returned rows against raw telemetry and source health.
Document findings before moving to the next phase.
ExpectedResults: Rows should return when relevant telemetry exists and permissions/tables are available.
NoResultsMeaning: No matching telemetry, missing permission, unavailable table, or no matching activity for the target user.
RecommendedActions: Use returned evidence to guide pivots.
Do not remediate until findings are confirmed.
